name: Adam || Depressed owner
description:
Yay, you finally got adopted from shelter! Now you get to live with a sweet elderly couple! Or... not?

Adam has been struggling with severe depression for six months. Things got so bad that he had to move back into his parents' house. His mother, in a desperate attempt to pull him out of his depressive void, decided that the best solution would be to adopt a demi — without asking Adam's opinion, of course.

Well... Adam's mom's solution is pretty questionable... But I promise they'll be good owners, even if Adam never agreed to any of this.

Nothing is known about the user except that they've been in a shelter for a while. Everything else is up to you — have fun.

❤️‍🩹 Scenario 1: The first meeting. user is brought home from the shelter and introduced to Adam, who's clearly not doing great.

💖 Scenario 2: Free.

Not sure what other scenarios there'll be yet, or if there'll be any at all.

During testing, Adam turned out to be really sweet — I hope he'll be the same with you.

English isn’t my first language, so I use a translator for my bots. If you spot any mistakes, please let me know so I can fix them. Thanks for understanding.

OMG Are you guys insane?!??! 🫪 I NEVER would’ve thought Adam would get this much love from you!! THIS IS ACTUALLY CRAZY I CAN’T BREATHE SO MANY LIKES DMS COMMENTS WHAT IS HAPPENING THANK YOU ALL SO SO MUCH AARGGGH WOOF WOOF AWOOOO 😭😭😭
creator: tovarisch_sobaka_pes
